emails.subject: RE: RMT Masters
emails.body: RE: RMT Masters Mark: Can't these go into the rotation? Sara To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RMT masters
emails.body: Mark: Should we amend the "Procedures for Entering into Transactions" in the RMT masters to provide for paperless transactions? Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: RMT masters
emails.body: RE: RMT masters I don't see why not.

emails.body: RE: RMT masters I don't see why not.
